app.title: Steam MP Game Finder
app.tagline: Find multiplayer games you all own.

friends.title: Select friends
friends.manyWarning: Many friends selected — comparison may take a while.
friends.privacyHint: Game libraries must be public (Profile → Edit → Game details: Public).
friends.noFriends: No friends loaded. Add profiles via URL.

loading.title: Loading your friends
loading.progressProfiles: {total, plural, one {# friend} other {# friends}} total
loading.tip0: Steam counts games you only own for the badge, too.
loading.tip1: We promise not to judge your 400 hours in a single-player game.
loading.tip2: Public libraries are the key. Private is fine — just not comparable.
loading.tip3: The server is politely asking Valve for your friends' libraries.
loading.tip4: One more friend… one more friend…
loading.tip5: Fun fact: "Never played" still counts as owned.
loading.tip6: Soon you'll see who hoards the most unplayed multiplayer games.
loading.tip7: The Valve API is on it — sometimes in slow motion.
loading.tip8: We sort by name, not by skill.
loading.tip9: Almost there. Then you can blame each other for what to buy.
loading.tip10: The next Steam sale is always "in a few weeks" — until it starts tomorrow.
loading.tip11: Wishlist: 200 games. Playtime this week: one tutorial.
loading.tip12: Trading cards are their own game — just without multiplayer.
loading.tip13: "Install later" often means uninstall in three months.
loading.tip14: Your download waits in the queue until you go offline.
loading.tip15: Steam Guard protects your account — not impulse purchases.
loading.tip16: Early Access: play now, features maybe later.
loading.tip17: Cloud saves: progress everywhere — except while syncing.
loading.tip18: Family sharing shares games, not who paid for them.
loading.tip19: Profile level goes up. The backlog stays the same.
loading.tip20: Profile screenshots: art gallery or proof of procrastination?
loading.tip21: The discovery queue knows your taste — unfortunately well.
loading.tip23: Games showcase: a curated version of your priorities.
loading.tip24: Workshop mods: +40 GB, +100 % fun, −100 % disk space.
loading.tip25: Steam Deck: portable excuses for not playing.
loading.tip26: Offline mode: for flights and guilty conscience alike.
loading.tip27: Free-to-play can be free — the shop finds that funny.
loading.tip28: Regional pricing explains why your friend paid "only $5."
loading.tip29: Big Picture: Steam from couch distance.
loading.tip30: Cart open, switch tabs — Steam already charged you.
loading.tip32: "Game of the Year" on Steam: often already in your library.
loading.tip33: Friend activity: watch others play while you wait.
loading.tip34: Group chat: "soon" is a relative unit of time.
loading.tip35: Season pass: content later — payment now.
loading.tip36: Install size 120 GB. Free space: 119 GB. A classic.
loading.tip37: "Just one more round" — a sentence with no end timestamp.
loading.tip38: Steam Awards: vote for games you'll buy on sale.
loading.tip39: Sorting your library doesn't help. Playing might. Theoretically.

results.title: Shared games
results.emptyHint: Adjust filters or check library visibility settings.
results.matchNearHint: On each card one person is marked who doesn't own the game. Comparison may take longer.
results.emptyBuyerFilter: {name} wouldn't need to buy any of these near matches.

storeModal.widgetLoadError: Could not load the store widget.

results.emptyTagFilter: No games match the selected categories.

landing.signInPrompt: Sign in with Steam to load your friend list and find shared multiplayer games.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
